assessment.note: He names a clear lack of role expectations week to week, which signals strong disengagement risk; also revealed a major clarity gap that should be probed next.

new_queue.label: What good looks like
new_queue.name: When you say 'what good looks like' — what feels most unclear week to week?
new_queue.description: Drills into his exact phrase to surface the specific expectation gap behind the late-change friction.

new_queue.label: Recent friction
new_queue.name: What has been the most frustrating part of the work lately?
new_queue.description: Lets him name the current friction without assuming the source.

new_queue.label: Confidence check
new_queue.name: Where has your confidence felt strongest or weakest in the last few weeks?
new_queue.description: Explores the confidence dip directly without turning it into a diagnosis.

new_queue.label: Requirement churn
new_queue.name: What keeps getting reprioritized in a way that changes your design work?
new_queue.description: Surfaces churn from shifting requirements and how it affects his focus.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Settle in
new_queue.name: Before we get into anything specific, what would be most useful to talk through today?
new_queue.description: Gives Kenji control over the agenda before any concern is introduced.

new_queue.label: Decision pressure
new_queue.name: Where do you feel most pressure to prove yourself in the work?
new_queue.description: Reveals the situations where he may be overextending or self-censoring.

new_queue.label: Support access
new_queue.name: When you need help, what usually makes it easy or hard to ask for it here?
new_queue.description: Tests whether the team setup makes support feel safe and usable.
